retrospectives.summary: 22 mistakes analyzed (M543-M564). Substantive entries: M543 (lock leak on OVERSIZED exit), M546 (bare sub-issue name resolution failure in IssueDiscovery), M549 (missing collect-results step), M552 (sequential parallel wave spawn), M553 (direct plugin edit bypass), M555/M563 (AutoLearnMistakes false positives on Java source / git diff — 3rd/4th recurrence), M557 (opaque JacksonException), M559 (missing squash prerequisite), M561 (investigation file in main workspace), M562 (BFG --delete-files filename-only misuse). 5 new patterns (PATTERN-025 through PATTERN-029). 7 new action items (A029-A035). 3 escalations created for persistently ineffective A001, A003, A020. PATTERN-023 (autolearn_false_positive) now worsening (4th+ recurrence). PATTERN-003 (path_config_assumption) continues worsening. PATTERN-001 and PATTERN-017 showing improvement with 0 new recurrences this period.

11 mistakes analyzed (M532-M542). Category breakdown: tool_limitation 2, incorrect_implementation 1, protocol_violation 1, remainder sparse/empty. PATTERN-003 (path_config_assumption) WORSENING, PATTERN-002 (task_status_lifecycle_violation) NO IMPROVEMENT. New pattern PATTERN-024 (error_output_priming) created from M538+M542 (compliance_failure:doc_missing:issue_workflow — embedded action suggestions in error output prime STOP bypass). Three second-round escalations created for A001, A003, A020 (all previously escalated in R028 but fixes not implemented). All three escalated to critical priority requiring CAT issue creation.

19 mistakes analyzed. Protocol violations dominant (5/19, 26%). PATTERN-003 (path_config_assumption) worsening — occurrences_after_fix=5 exceeds pre-fix count of 3. PATTERN-002 (task_status_lifecycle_violation) no improvement. A001, A003, A020 all confirmed ineffective and escalated to ESCALATE-2026-03-10-001/002/003. M531 (tool_misuse: work-prepare wrong issue selection) is first occurrence — no new pattern created yet.

31 mistakes analyzed. Protocol violations dominant (5/31). New patterns: PATTERN-014 (batch_skill_invocation_failure, 5), PATTERN-015 (shell_operator_escaping, 3), PATTERN-019 (line_length_violation, 2), PATTERN-020 (mandatory_step_treated_as_optional, 2), PATTERN-021 (skill_output_re_presentation, 2), PATTERN-022 (workflow_rejection_handling, 3), PATTERN-023 (autolearn_false_positive, 2). High-severity open items: A001 (ineffective, validation separation), A020 (ineffective, approval gate).

37 mistakes analyzed. Protocol violations dominant (12/37, 32%). New patterns: PATTERN-023 (autolearn false positives, 2 occurrences), plus 7 recurrences of existing patterns. A020 escalated: implementation was incomplete—hook checks AskUserQuestion was called but does not validate answers are non-empty. M459, M462, M463, M464 all bypass approval gate via empty answers object.

35 mistakes analyzed (M565-M599). Substantive entries: M565 (rules re-injection assumption), M567 (skill_structure_violation in instruction-builder), M571 (ClaudeEnv convention gap), M572 (data loss from rebase conflict), M576 (VerifyStateInCommit.java glob suggestion), M579 (manual merge data loss), M581 (client/ bypass of cat:add+cat:work), M583 (wrong commit type for client/**), M586 (work-squash collapses planning commits), M587 (skip verify-implementation-agent), M591/M592 (issue_path cognitive anchor), M593 (approval gate bypass via manual Agent task), M594 (WORKTREE_PATH vs CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR in work-merge-agent), M595 (cat:add invoked without description), M596/M597 (stakeholder-review fabrication from output template priming), M598 (incorrect instruction to commit intermediate file). 2 new patterns (PATTERN-030: skill_output_format_priming, PATTERN-031: skill_incorrect_instruction). 2 new action items (A036, A037). 3 escalations created (ESCALATE-2026-03-23-001/002/003) for persistently ineffective A001, A003, A020. PATTERN-003 (path_config_assumption) continues WORSENING with M594. PATTERN-017 (approval_gate_bypass) has new recurrence M593. PATTERN-030 is a structural recurrence of output fabrication pattern.
